parameters.content:
Complete Visual Flow

👆 Click Execute
      │
      ▼
🌐 GET Products from SAP
   (product_details1)
      │
      ▼
⚙️ Clean & Extract 100 Products
   (Code in JavaScript)
      │
      ▼
🔄 Loop Over Items
   Pick 1 product at a time
      │
      ├──────── LOOP BRANCH ────────┐
      │                             │
      │   🌐 GET CSRF Token         │
      │   (Security Key from SAP)   │
      │         │                   │
      │   ⚙️ Extract Token          │
      │   Package with Product      │
      │         │                   │
      │   🌐 PATCH Update Product   │
      │   Update ProductGroup       │
      │   in SAP ✅                 │
      │         │                   │
      └─────────────────────────────┘
            (repeat 100 times)
      │
      └──── DONE BRANCH ────▶ 📊 Final Report
                               All 100 Updated ✅


This n8n workflow automates the bulk update of SAP products. It starts by fetching all 100 products from SAP using a GET API call. These products are then passed into a Loop Over Items node which processes each product one at a time. For every product the workflow first fetches a CSRF security token from SAP — which is mandatory for any write operation. It then sends a PATCH API request to SAP to update the ProductGroup field of that specific product. Once all 100 products are updated the workflow prints a final success report. This entire process which would normally require 100 manual updates in SAP is completed automatically in seconds!


Batch Size	Recommendation
1	Safest for SAP — no overload
5	Good balance of speed and safety
10+	Risk of SAP timeout or overload
💡 For demo purposes use Batch Size 5 to clearly show the difference without overloading SAP
